# Broken Media Repo

Fixture sample for destructive media handling.

This README intentionally references a missing image, a corrupt PDF fixture, and
an oversized binary placeholder. E2E must route all of these through local
fixture adapters and fall back to the dark local placeholder instead of showing
broken dashboard images.

![missing](fixture://broken-media-repo/artifacts/missing-image.png)
[corrupt pdf](fixture://broken-media-repo/artifacts/corrupt-sample.pdf)
